## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Strada (AI voice platform for insurance industry) and GrowthX Labs (AI-powered content marketing agency) for organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strada is an early-stage startup (\~2.5 years old) looking to scale up marketing efforts, particularly organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation, SEO, and link-building services with a 12-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month for editorial content, with additional $6,000/month for link building](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term organic growth strategy, cautioning against expectations of quick results](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Topics

### Strada Company Overview

  - [AI voice platform for insurance industry, working with brokers and carriers](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Founded 2.5 years ago, went through YC Summer '23](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Currently in growth phase after initial bumpy period](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Focused on upper mid-market and enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Current growth primarily through manual outbound efforts (LinkedIn, cold email, investor intros)](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### GrowthX Labs Services and Approach

  - [AI-powered content creation with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Comprehensive onboarding process to understand client's audience and develop content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Iterative calibration process to refine content quality and voice](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Link-building services to boost domain authority and organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Base editorial package: $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Link building add-on: $6,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [12-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Focused on companies with at least $1M+ annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Expected Results and Timeline

  - [Cautioned against expectations of quick results (3-6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Emphasized long-term, compounding benefits of organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Shared example of Chiro (similar stage company) seeing growth after 3-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

### Client Involvement and Time Commitment

  - [Higher involvement in first 60 days (6-10 hours/week)](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Weekly calls and async communication for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [Gradual reduction in time commitment as content process is refined](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed SOW (Statement of Work) and proposal](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Strada to review proposal with internal team and assess investment timing](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [If moving forward, potential kick-off in mid to late May](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
  - [Strada to consider additional questions or need for follow-up call to build internal case](https://fathom.video/share/zqpFdPhxs6-_8fJbPX_5z-WS9PetnH9q?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
